subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my Lord, my Support, the Ultimate Goal of my desire and my Hope and the End of my aspirations! Thou seest me departed from my homeland [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی و سیدی و سندی و غایه بغیتی و رجائی و منتهی املی ترانی خرجت من الوطن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for pilgrims, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
